prompts.text: Huge armored plates along the back and a very long tail, often mistaken in popular culture with stegosaurus-like plates.

prompts.label: hadrosaurus

prompts.text: A nimble, small-bodied predator with a crested head and likely strong eyesight.
prompts.label: allosaurus
